Address: 617 Masonic Ave, San Francisco, CA 94117
Description (Premium Data):
Please note availability date: JUNE 1st, 2026

TOP FLOOR Edwardian w/ 4BR & 2 baths, large kitchen and beautiful backyard!
One parking space in driveway and in-unit laundry included.

This TOP FLOOR, light-filled, Edwardian flat is centrally located between USF and Haight Ashbury. The unit features high-ceilings and many original architectural touches, like wainscot and wall paneling, and beautiful French doors. The apartment has REFINISHED hardwood floors throughout and every room is filled with tons of charm and warmth. There's a large living room in the front of the flat, four bedrooms (the master also includes a very large 'sun room' which could also be used as a great office space), an eat-in kitchen, two full baths, laundry in the unit and plenty of storage and closets throughout. You have plenty of space to move around, especially if you're currently working from home. One parking space is also included in carport right in front of the house. Don't miss the photo of the beautiful backyard, which is shared by just two other apartments in this three-unit building.

FEATURES & AMENITIES:
Hardwood floors
Two updated bathrooms with decorative tiles
Spacious, eat-in kitchen with new dishwasher
In-unit washer/dryer
Master bedroom with adjoining office / sun room
Beautiful backyard with flagstone
Close to voluminous public transportation routes, Lucky Supermarket, Bistro Gambrinus, Altamirano, USF, and a short five block walk to the buzz and fun of Divisadero Street!

Tenant pays all utilities
One year lease, then month to month (Rent Control!)

Carport parking for one car included in the rent.

Address: 2920 Buchanan St #3B, San Francisco, CA 94123
Description (Premium Data):
NEWLY REMODELED 1250 sq. ft. 2BD/2BA VIEW CONDO plus ADDITIONAL DETACHED 650 sq. ft. 3 RM/1BA SUITE * Newly remodeled view condo offers an exceptionally flexible configuration across 2 independent floors with 1,900 sq. ft. total of living/office space. * Very light & bright throughout, with an inner courtyard setting away from street.

UPPER FLOOR offers a 1250 sq. ft. traditional 2BD/2BA floor plan with an open living/dining area, fireplace, bar & Bay/City views. * A sunny contemporary eat-in kitchen has new countertops & stainless steel appliances. * The primary bedroom suite features his/her closets & en suite bathroom. 

LOWER FLOOR SUITE offers 3 rooms, wet bar/mini-fridge, full bathroom & direct access to an outdoor common area terrace. Detached from upper floor - accessed via common interior stairway.

Building amenities include a large roof deck with spectacular Bay/GG Bridge views, a gym & sauna, free laundry room, and elevator. 

1 car parking & storage area included. * Great location, 1/2 block from Union Street & at the crossroads of The Marina, Cow Hollow & Pacific Heights. Boutique shopping, dining & nightlife are just steps away. 

MAXIMUM OCCUPANCY 3
NO SMOKING/NO PETS 
DEPOSIT: 1 1/2 times monthly rent 
SHOWING: By appointment

Water, garbage, and gas for water heaters included. Renter pays for in-unit electricity and gas usage. 1 vehicle parking included. No pets. No smoking.Show more

Address: The Landing, 1395 22nd St, San Francisco, CA 94107
Description (Premium Data): Experience contemporary living at The Landing, a modern apartment community in San Francisco's vibrant Dogpatch neighborhood. Offering one-, two-, and three-bedroom residences, homes feature open-concept layouts, quartz countertops, SMEG stainless steel appliances, high ceilings, in-unit washer/dryers, and private patios or balconies in select homes.Enjoy thoughtfully curated amenities including a half-acre rooftop park and terrace, state-of-the-art fitness center with classes, co-working spaces, and a gaming and theater lounge. Residents also have access to a wine bar and cafe, pet spa, bike repair station, and community events designed for connection and creativity.Located in Dogpatch near Potrero Hill, The Landing offers easy access to dining, waterfront parks, and transitdelivering a seamless blend of comfort, community, and convenience.

Description (Premium Data):
Sophisticated, top-floor flat in coveted Duboce Park neighborhood.

Located a half-block from the park on a peaceful, tree-lined cul-de-sac, this exquisite two-bedroom, two-bath home is situated on the top floor of a boutique two-unit building but lives with the privacy and essence of a single-family residence.

Bursting with charm, this home has been meticulously remodeled to balance high-end aesthetics with modern efficiency. Enjoy an open-concept great room where the living, kitchen, and dining areas flow seamlessly beneath soaring 13-foot vaulted ceilings. Natural light pours through French doors that lead to your private deck the perfect transition to a shared, sunny, and beautifully landscaped backyard. Whether you're hosting friends by the gas fire pit or enjoying the peace of the shared garden sitting area, this is an urban oasis designed for entertaining.
The gourmet chef's kitchen is a functional masterpiece, featuring a striking copper range hood, custom two-tone cabinetry with under-cabinet lighting, and premium quartz countertops. Beyond the interior, the location is unparalleled: you are steps from the iconic "Painted Ladies" at Alamo Square, the vibrant cafes of the Castro and Haight Street, and minutes from major medical centers and transit hubs. This is a rare opportunity to enjoy a tech-forward, luxury retreat in one of San Francisco's most storied locations.

Features:
- Chef's Kitchen: High-end energy-efficient appliances, pot filler, copper range hood, and built-in island with bar seating.
- Modern Tech: Dedicated solar panels, Ring doorbell/intercom, Nest thermostats, - CAT 6 cabling, and USB outlets.
- Climate & Comfort: In-floor radiant heating, double-pane windows, and an operable skylight for natural ventilation.
- Premium Finishes: Luxury vinyl floors, carpeted bedrooms, and bathrooms featuring designer tile and a dual-sink vanity in the primary suite.
- Outdoor Living: Private deck overlooking a shared landscaped backyard with a gas fire pit and sitting area.
- Storage & Parking: Dedicated storage unit and bicycle storage included; ample street parking available (garage space available for an additional fee).
- Laundry: In-unit washer and dryer.

Location Highlights
- Parks: Steps from Duboce Park; minutes to Buena Vista, Golden Gate, and Alamo Square Parks.
- Commute: Convenient access to BART, MUNI, and the 101/I-80 freeway ramps.
- Proximity: Easy reach to UCSF Medical Centers (Mission Bay, Parnassus, Davies, and Mt. Zion) and major universities including Cal State and Hastings School of Law.

 **Square footage is estimated for purposes of marketing and may not be exact. If exact square footage is a concern, unit/property should be independently measured**

Note: This unit is subject to the San Francisco Rent Ordinance.

- Monthly Rent: $7850/month
- Lease Duration: Minimum 12 months.
- Security Deposit: 1x monthly rent (with 750+ FICO and strong references).
- Pets: Negotiable, considered on an individual basis (size, number, and behavior).
- Policy: Non-smoking building and unit; Renter's Insurance required.
- Parking: Garage Parking available for an additional $500/month
- Application: $40 fee per applicant (18+); unit delivered unfurnished.Show more

Address: Avalon Ocean Avenue, 1200 Ocean Ave #2B-2Ba-1139Sqft, San Francisco, CA 94112
2336 Broadway St, San Francisco, CA 94115
Description (Premium Data): Rare opportunity to live in one of San Francisco's most beautiful mansions, boasting sweeping and direct views from Coit Tower to the Marin Headlands, of the Golden Gate Bridge, Palace of Fine Arts, Alcatraz, and the Bay. There are 6 bedrooms and and 6.5 baths with high ceilings throughout and decks on every level. A dramatic, grand foyer is enhanced by leaded glass windows and intricate details. At the front of the home is an expansive paneled formal living room, with a striking gas fireplace and south-facing oversized windows. At the back is a magnificent formal dining room with coffered ceiling, a family room or breakfast area with attached deck to admire the stunning views, and a chef's kitchen equipped with a central island, deluxe appliances, and fabulous views. On the upper level is a stunning primary suite with his and her'' baths (including dry sauna and steam shower), walk-in closet and dressing room, and a viewing deck, plus a sprawling den, library, or bedroom, furnished with handsome paneling, gas fireplace, ensuite bath, and walk-in closet. On the upper level are 4 bedrooms and 3 bathrooms, and at the top is a playroom or family room, skylit from above with a picture window and attached deck facing unparallelled outlooks. On the lower level is a separate yet integrated guest suite, with a family room, kitchenette, bedroom, bath, and large deck with a hot tub and stairs down to the garden. The level, turfed lawn is perfect for recreation. A 2-car-side by side garage completes the picture. State-of-the-art building systems and designer finishes throughout. Experience the pinnacle of luxury living in San Francisco.Show more

Address: 3135 Pacific Ave APT 6, San Francisco, CA 94115
Description (Premium Data):
Experience luxury in this elegant 3BR/2BA penthouse in prestigious Presidio Heights. Enjoy sweeping views of the Golden Gate Bridge, Bay, Mt. Tam, and the Pacific. Featuring high ceilings, period details, and designer finishes, this serene home offers refined living.

The space

On one of the most prestigious blocks in Presidio Heights is a one-of-a-kind, sophisticated and serene, 2nd-level Penthouse in a turn-of-the-century, Tudor Revival building. It is quiet and sunny and is nestled among luxury estates and meticulously maintained homes. It boasts sweeping views from every room that include the Presidio, San Francisco Bay, the Golden Gate Bridge, Mt Tamalpais, and west over the city to the ocean.

This Penthouse is bright and very charming, featuring period details, wood trim, high ceilings, and designer finishes with a nod to the elegance and handsome sophistication of Ralph Lauren Living. This Penthouse offers a spacious layout with a large living room; a dining room (with an acacia wood dining table); oak hardwood flooring throughout; luxurious natural stone bathrooms and countertops; 2 large bedrooms (Cali king and Queen) with access to a large private sun deck from one of them; 1 upstairs attic bedroom (Two full beds) - note that the stairs to the attic are steep; in-room remote working spaces; and a modern kitchen equipped with stone countertops, a gas cooktop, dual ovens, a dishwasher, and ample cabinet space.

Each bedroom is outfitted with luxurious foam and innerspring mattresses that provide cushioned yet supportive, adaptive comfort. Additionally, comfort features include 800+ thread count, 100% cotton sheets; sumptuous down comforters; soft yet breathable cotton and muslin blankets; down and/or foam pillows; and a smart TV.

The included utilities are: water and garbage. Dedicated parking in front of the driveway is included; easy street parking otherwise. Pets are negotiable. Please note that the stairs to the third bedroom (attic room) are steep.

Other things to note

Stairs:

There is a flight of stairs up to the building door, then one long flight of stairs up to the unit, and a final shorter flight of steps once inside the unit.

To access Bedroom 3 (attic room with 2 full beds), there is another steep flight of internal steps within the unit.
